title: Validated XML Schema Generator
scenario: Generate a validated XML schema for a customer information dataset. The schema should include definitions for customer ID, name, address, and contact information. The schema should also include validation rules to ensure that the customer ID is a unique string and the contact information is a valid email address.
constraints: Must validate against the provided example data
Must include a definition for the contact information

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated XML schema is valid and follows standard XML schema best practices.
Check if the generated XML schema adheres to the constraints of validating against the provided example data and including a definition for the contact information.
Check if the generated XML schema includes clear explanations for the validation rules and definitions.
